zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight於1383年7月15日出生在英國爾希布盧可時，他的父親Richard de Vernon, II13歲，母親Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon13歲。他於1410年之前與Benedicta de Ludlow在英國史洛普爾通結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1445年被列為treasurer of calais。他去世於1451年8月24日在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight于1383年7月15日出生在英国爾希布盧可时，他的父亲Richard de Vernon, II13岁，母亲Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon13岁。他于1410年之前与Benedicta de Ludlow在英国史洛普爾通结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1445年被列为treasurer of calais。他去世于1451年8月24日在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾通。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight was born on 15 July 1383, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Vernon, II, was 13 and his mother, Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, was 13. He married Benedicta de Ludlow before 1410, in Tong, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. In 1445, at the age of 62, his occupation is listed as treasurer of calais. He died on 24 August 1451, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight est né le 15 juillet 1383, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vernon, II, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Benedicta de Ludlow avant 1410, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. En 1445, à l’âge de 62 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est treasurer of calais. Il est décédé le 24 août 1451, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight am 15. Juli 1383 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Vernon, II 13 und seine Mutter Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon 13. Er hat vor 1410 in Tong, Shropshire, England Benedicta de Ludlow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1445, als er 62 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als treasurer of calais aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. August 1451 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Tong, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight è nato il il 15 luglio 1383 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Vernon, II, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Benedicta de Ludlow prima del 1410, nel Tong, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1445, all'età di 62 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come treasurer of calais. Morì il 24 agosto 1451, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Tong, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knightが1383年7月15日にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon, IIは13歳，母Johanna ferch Rhys Vernonは13歳であった。1410年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングでBenedicta de Ludlowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1445年，62歳の時，職業はtreasurer of calaisと記録されている。彼は1451年8月24日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアトングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight(이)가 1383년 7월 15일 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon, II(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1410년 이전 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 Benedicta de Ludlow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1445년, 62세의 나이로 그의 직업은 treasurer of calais이었다. 그는 1451년 8월 24일 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 탕에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight nasceu em 15 de julho de 1383, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Vernon, II, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedicta de Ludlow antes 1410, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1445, com 62 anos, sua profissão aparece como treasurer of calais. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1451, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight родился 15 июля 1383 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon, II было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedicta de Ludlow перед 1410 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1445 году, в возрасте 62 лет,  он работал по профессии treasurer of calais. Он умер 24 августа 1451 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight nació el 15 de julio de 1383, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Vernon, II, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Benedicta de Ludlow antes de 1410, en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1445, a la edad de 62 años, su ocupación registrada era treasurer of calais. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1451, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
